title: Farm Business Saga
description: Build and grow your own farm empire in Farm Business Saga! Plant crops, raise animals, and expand your farm to become the ultimate farming tycoon.
instructions: Use mouse or touch to plant, harvest, and manage your farm resources. Expand wisely to maximize profits.
tips: Invest in upgrades early—automation will help your farm grow faster.

title: Dynamons 12
description: Join the exciting world of Dynamons once again in Dynamons 12! Train your creatures, battle rivals, and discover new adventures in this monster-catching series.
instructions: Use mouse or touch to select moves, battle enemies, and capture new Dynamons to expand your team.
tips: Build a balanced team—different Dynamons have unique strengths and weaknesses.

title: Airport Simulator
description: Manage a busy airport by directing planes, handling passengers, and ensuring everything runs smoothly. Keep the operations efficient to avoid delays.
instructions: Use mouse or touch to interact with planes and facilities. Complete missions and expand your airport.
tips: Prioritize critical flights, upgrade facilities regularly, and balance passenger flow for maximum efficiency.

title: Flight Sim: Air Traffic
description: Step into the role of an air traffic controller! Manage incoming and outgoing flights, prevent collisions, and keep the skies safe in this realistic simulation.
instructions: Use mouse or touch to guide planes, assign runways, and control traffic. Ensure safe landings and departures.
tips: Keep an eye on flight paths, avoid crossing routes, and handle priority flights first to maintain smooth operations.
